pi_items.source: setup_task.sh and verifier.py explicitly target p06 as corrupted
setup_task.sh and verifier.py explicitly use 5 valid participants (p01-p05)
setup_task.sh writes to this file path, and verifier.py reads from it

privileged_info_summary: Verified that the task operates on synthetically generated .wav files representing voice onset times. The corrupted participant is explicitly seeded as p06, leaving 5 valid participants (p01-p05). The output file expected by the verifier is /home/ga/pebl/analysis/vocal_rt_report.json, and the ground truth values are stored at /var/lib/app/ground_truth/vocal_rts.json.
